title: Ayn Rand & the Prophecy of Atlas Shrugged
original_title: Ayn Rand & the Prophecy of Atlas Shrugged
overview: Ayn Rand & the Prophecy of Atlas Shrugged is a feature length documentary film that examines the resurging interest in Ayn Rands epic and controversial 1957 novel and the validity of its dire prediction for America.
